TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Rick_Adelman, title = Rick_Adelman, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rick_Adelman} }

S.FORM: Rick Adelman sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1946, ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 1, Rick Adelman, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Rick Adelman sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1946, ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 1, Rick Adelman, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: riʦ~ʨk a*elman s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, riʦ~ʨk a*elman, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
